examples: I'll have coffee and a brioche.
"I should like to see the swans eat the brioche," said the child.
In the meanwhile, the two little waifs had approached the brioche at the same time as the swans.
The Sicilian specialty, ice cream served in a briosca (brioche sandwich) is terrifyingly delicious.
It was very much a case of wanting both the cake and to eat the brioche at the same time.
